selection_rule: all v015e dev cases with false_positive_count > 0 or false_negative_count >= 2, plus protected/manual controls

aggregate_context.interpretation: v015e held precision but failed dev recall, so v016 should change the prompt-lab method rather than merely tighten individual-body wording.

cases.prompt_relevance: Dense military-equipment recall collapsed to one prediction without a false-positive rebound.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata; treat as prompt-recall evidence unless a later visual audit proves otherwise.
cases.v016_implication: v016 needs a candidate-discovery mechanism that does not stop after one confident target in dense scenes.

cases.prompt_relevance: The model emitted many detections but only one matched, showing that count recovery alone can become misplaced enumeration.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 must combine discovery with an evidence budget and self-filter instead of asking for more boxes generically.

cases.prompt_relevance: A one-target case gained an extra unsupported prediction.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should keep a final evidence filter for extra single-case detections.

cases.prompt_relevance: The largest dense recall collapse in the reviewed set, with precision preserved by under-detection.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should explicitly handle dense target discovery before final filtering, without resorting to row-fragment enumeration.

cases.prompt_relevance: The model selected the wrong target shape/location rather than abstaining.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should make final detections justify the selected object boundary, not just the category.

cases.prompt_relevance: Building precision regressed through unsupported extra detections.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should discourage adjacent context boxes and require one final box per clearly supported target.

cases.prompt_relevance: A smaller multi-building recall miss that mirrors the dense-equipment failures.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should handle secondary visible targets without using scene-central-only logic.

cases.prompt_relevance: Case 101 is still useful as a hinge, but only with manual interpretation because the broad-box failure and reference caveats distort simple metric reading.
cases.reference_eval_notes: Manual review records a large foreground reference box and duplicate reference boxes for target_7/target_8. The v015e hinge prediction remained a broad group/scene box.
cases.v016_implication: Use 101 as a manual diagnostic, not a single numeric optimization target. v016 should separate dense recall, broad-box rejection, and reference-shape caveats.

cases.prompt_relevance: Another one-target building case with an extra unsupported detection.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 needs a final duplicate/adjacent-context rejection step inside the prompt interface.

cases.prompt_relevance: Mixed-category scene where v015e preserved precision by missing supported targets.
cases.reference_eval_notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat in the split metadata.
cases.v016_implication: v016 should make category-specific discovery explicit without broadening into context hallucinations.

cases.prompt_relevance: Protected object-not-found behavior remained safe in dev.
cases.reference_eval_notes: Protected control should remain a no-regression gate.
cases.v016_implication: Any v016 prompt must preserve object-not-found abstention and avoid adding positive detections here.

cases.prompt_relevance: Holdout protected control is tracked as a future no-regression guard, not as dev evidence.
cases.reference_eval_notes: Reference-only in this package; v015e holdout was not run.
cases.v016_implication: Do not tune directly on 166 before a separately approved holdout wave.
